## Client

- **Company:**
- **Retainer slot:**
- **Week of:** YYYY-MM-DD

## Deliverable

- **Type:** (site page / deck slide / one-pager / social card / Loom / email / motion / other)
- **Brief (one sentence):**
- **Reference artifact:**

## Voice + system

- [ ] Tokens applied (`design/CLAUDE_DESIGN_BRIEF.md` section 6)
- [ ] Type pairing applied (section 7)
- [ ] One italic accent per paragraph maximum
- [ ] Banned-word list enforced
- [ ] Run through `noise-cancel`

## Ship

- [ ] Draft reviewed at 1.5x speed (for video) / printed (for print) / mobile-checked (for web)
- [ ] Approved
- [ ] Delivered to client
- [ ] Logged in retainer ledger
